title: Luc Rousseau
subtitle: Product Engineer — Systems, architecture & product execution
content:
I work at the intersection of product strategy, system architecture, and hands-on execution. WordPress and headless, APIs, multi-site platforms, technical debt, and delivery—with one accountable partner for clarity and coherence.

Based in Quebec, I work with product and engineering leaders who want strategic technical partnership, not hourly or task-based work.
